issues.description: Missing condition that restricts the target to {Straw Hat Crew} type Characters only. The effectText specifies 'Give up to 1 of your currently given DON!! cards to 1 of your {Straw Hat Crew} type Characters' but the DSL has no type restriction on the target.
The Rest action should be part of the cost, not a separate action in the actions array. The text says 'You may rest this Stage:' indicating it's the cost of activation.
